login.subtitle: Sign in with your license key or your Google account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, preferences, and stored data.
settings.languageHint: Choose the interface language. "System" follows your operating system.
settings.name: Name
settings.confirmDeleteAccounts: This will delete ALL Instagram accounts. Are you sure?
settings.confirmDeleteScrapes: This will delete ALL scraped data. Are you sure?
settings.confirmWipeAll: This will erase ALL your data: accounts, scrapes, categories, history, schedules and preferences. You will stay logged in. Are you sure?

home.prompt: What do you want to do today?
home.scrapeDescription: Build a list of usernames from followers, hashtags, or posts.
home.coldDmDescription: Launch a DM campaign to your lead list.

noSubscription.title: No active subscription
noSubscription.descriptionWithEmail: We couldn't find an active MonchoOps subscription on {{email}}. Visit the website to activate a plan.
noSubscription.descriptionNoEmail: Visit the website to activate a MonchoOps plan and start using the app.

instagramAccounts.retryDialogDescriptionStored: Retry with the saved password, or enter a new one if you changed it.
instagramAccounts.retryDialogDescriptionTyped: Enter the password to retry signing in.
instagramAccounts.newPasswordLabel: New password (leave empty to use saved)
instagramAccounts.configureProxyDescription: Route @{{username}}'s traffic through a custom proxy.
instagramAccounts.deleteAccountDescription: This removes the stored session from this device. You'll have to log in again if you want to use it later.
instagramAccounts.removeProxyDescription: The account will route traffic directly instead of through the saved proxy.
instagramAccounts.addDialogDescription: Choose how you want to sign in.
instagramAccounts.manualHint: A browser window will open so you can sign in to Instagram yourself. The session is then saved to this device.
instagramAccounts.proxyHint: The proxy is used for the login attempt and saved to the account for all future sessions.
instagramAccounts.proxyFieldsOptional: Proxy fields are optional. Proxy URL must be
instagramAccounts.chooseFileHint: Click to choose a .csv, .txt, .xlsx, or .xls file
instagramAccounts.enterUserAndPass: Please enter both username and password
instagramAccounts.enterProxyUrl: Enter a proxy URL or disable the proxy toggle
instagramAccounts.badProxyShape: Proxy URL must look like http://host:port or socks5://host:port
instagramAccounts.noAccountsDescription: Link an Instagram account to start sending DMs or scraping usernames.
instagramAccounts.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, name or proxy…
instagramAccounts.noMatchDescription: Adjust your search or status filter to find the account you're looking for.

massDms.title: Cold DM
massDms.subtitle: Five steps: pick the account, the leads, the message, any pre-DM interactions, then review and send.
massDms.noAccountDescription: Cold DMs run from a signed-in account.
massDms.fileEmpty: Drop a usernames file or click to browse
massDms.fileFormatHint: CSV, TXT, XLSX or XLS — first column is the username.
massDms.fileDragNotSupported: Drag-and-drop from this source is not supported — use "Browse" instead.
massDms.scrapesSearchPlaceholder: Search scrapes by summary, kind or category…
massDms.noScrapesDescription: Run a scrape from Scrape Leads. Once it finishes, you can reuse its results here.
massDms.noCategoriesDescription: Tag a scrape with a category to start pooling leads.
massDms.intervalHint: Minimum 30s — lower paces trip IG's anti-spam. Jitter ±25% is applied automatically.
massDms.variantsCount: {{n}}/{{max}} - one picked at random per DM -
massDms.noSavedDescription: Create a reusable set of DM variations from the Message Variants screen.
massDms.savedNoMatch: No saved groups match your search.
massDms.interactionsWarmDesc: Before each DM the account visits the target's profile, optionally follows them, and can like a few of their recent posts. Already-followed targets are never unfollowed.
massDms.followDesc: Sends a follow request. Skipped when already following / requested.
massDms.likeDesc: Likes this many of their most recent posts. Skipped if the profile has no posts or is private.
massDms.watchDesc: Silently views any active stories before the DM. Adds a few seconds per target; nudges reply rate up. Skipped when no story is available.
massDms.interactionsFootnote: Max {{max}} likes per target. A human-ish delay sits between the interactions and the DM so the funnel reads as organic to Instagram's anti-spam checks.
massDms.alreadyDmedTitle: {{count}} of {{total}} recipients were already DMed by {{account}}
massDms.alreadyDmedSkipping: Those targets will be skipped — this run will attempt {{count}}.
massDms.willEnqueue: This account is busy. The Cold DM will be added to its queue and start once the current jobs finish.

coldDmHistory.noRunsDescription: Once you send your first campaign, it will show up here.

coldDmHistoryDetail.noLogDescription: This run has no per-recipient log. It may predate the detail view.

scrape.title: Scrape leads
scrape.subtitle: Three quick steps: pick the account, configure the scrape, review and start.
scrape.noAccountDescription: Scrapes run from a signed-in account.
scrape.modeUsernameHint: Followers + commenters + likers of the profile's posts & reels
scrape.modePostHint: Commenters + likers of a single permalink
scrape.modeHashtagHint: Commenters + likers of posts tagged with the hashtag
scrape.modeLocationHint: Commenters + likers of posts tagged at the location
scrape.categoryHint: Optional. Tagged scrapes get pooled into a deduplicated lead category.
scrape.willEnqueue: This account is busy. The scrape will be added to its queue and start once the current jobs finish.

queue.nothingDescription: Jobs in progress or waiting show up here.

data.noDataDescription: Scraped leads show up here, ready to export or reuse in a campaign.
data.searchPlaceholder: Search by summary, kind, category or status…
data.cannotRetry: Cannot retry this scrape — original account or parameters are missing.

leadsDetail.noResultsEmpty: This scrape finished without producing any usernames.

categories.noCategoriesDescription: Group scrapes under a shared category to pool leads and dedupe across runs.
categories.createDialogDescription: Pool scraped leads under a shared name. Scrapes tagged with this category feed into the same deduplicated list.
categories.deleteDialogDescription: This removes the category and every lead pooled inside it. Linked scrapes stay intact.

categoryLeadsDetail.noResultsEmpty: Run a scrape tagged with this category to populate it.
categoryLeadsDetail.showingFirst: Showing first 1000 rows — export the CSV for the full list.

messageVariants.noGroupsDescription: Save a named set of DM variations once, reuse it across every Cold DM run.
messageVariants.noMatchDescription: No variant groups match your search.
messageVariants.dialogDescription: Save a reusable set of DM variations. One will be picked at random per DM when you use this group in a Cold DM run.
messageVariants.deleteDialogDescription: Historical Cold DM jobs keep their original variants — only this reusable group is removed.

actions.title: Actions
actions.subtitle: Pick what you want to run. You'll be asked to select an Instagram account next.
actions.massDmsDescription: Send a message to a list of usernames, with a configurable interval.
actions.scrapeDescription: Pull usernames from a profile's followers, comments, hashtags, or locations.

sidebar.logoutDialogDescription: Your Instagram accounts, scrapes, categories and history stay on this device. You'll see them again next time you log in with the same account.

accountStep.noWorkingDescription: All your linked accounts are in an error state. Retry or remove them from the Accounts screen.
accountStep.noAccountsDescription: Link an Instagram account from the Accounts screen first.

jobStartedPanel.completedScrapeSubtitle: Leads are ready. Open View data to review and export.
jobStartedPanel.completedDmSubtitle: All DMs have been sent. Check DM History for delivery details.
jobStartedPanel.cancelledSubtitle: The job was cancelled before finishing.
jobStartedPanel.failedSubtitle: The job stopped due to an error. Check the Queue for details.
jobStartedPanel.queuedSubtitle: The account is busy — this job will start once earlier jobs finish. Track it in the Queue.
jobStartedPanel.scrapeSubtitle: Collecting leads. Progress updates in real time.
jobStartedPanel.dmSubtitle: Sending DMs. Progress updates in real time.
jobStartedPanel.waiting: Waiting for the account to free up…

updateBanner.availableHint: Click Download to get the latest version from monchoops.com.

accountPicker.noAccountsLinked: You need to link an Instagram account first.
